name: Ribollita
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Packed Torn Dark Green Kale
1 cup Chopped Fresh Tomatoes with Juice
1 can (15 oz.) Cannellini Beans, no liquid
2 cups Stale Italian Bread, cut into bite-size pieces
Extra virgin Olive Oil for drizzling
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large soup pot or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add the bacon and olive oil; cook until about three-quarters done, 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Add onion and potatoes; stir often, cooking 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add red pepper flakes, garlic, carrot, and celery; cook, stirring, an additional minute or two.
5. Stir in thyme, kale, chicken broth, and tomatoes; bring to a simmer.
6. Cook slowly about 12 minutes.
7. Stir in beans with their liquid and bread; cook for 2 minutes until thickened.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. To serve, ladle soup into bowls and drizzle generously with olive oil. If making ahead of time, the soup will be thicker the next day but still delicious. If too thick, thin with chicken stock when reheating.
10. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
